chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3100 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.16354/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A. No.16355/2025 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 10.11.2025 Mr. Ahmad Shahmir, Advocate for the Applicant a/w applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Muhammad Yaseen Paracha son of Muhammad Iqbal Paracha seeks protective bail in FIR No.2082/2025 E-Tag No.GM-20/09/2025- 4693, under Section-489-F PPC registered at P.S Ghalib Market Lahore. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case; that the applicant intends to surrender before the trial court for his bail but apprehends his imminent arrest by the hands of police at the doorstep of the court, hence this application for protective/transitory bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 15 days from today i.e 10.11.2025 to 24.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 15 days period i.e. 24.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier.

The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 15 days period i.e. 24.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
